calendarFaqs.q: When does school start for San Diego Unified School District in 2025-2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school for San Diego Unified School District is Monday, August 11, 2025. Students and staff are expected to report on this date to begin the new academic year.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for San Diego Unified School District in 2025-2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school for San Diego Unified School District is Thursday, May 28, 2026. The school year runs from August through May, covering 180 instructional days.

calendarFaqs.q: When is spring break 2025-2026 for San Diego Unified School District?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Recess for San Diego Unified School District runs March 30–April 3, 2026 — later than most Bay Area and Central Valley California districts whose breaks fall in mid-March. The late-March to early-April timing often means lower airfare than peak mid-March travel windows.

calendarFaqs.q: When is winter break 2025-2026 for San Diego Unified School District?
calendarFaqs.a: Winter break for San Diego Unified School District runs December 22, 2025–January 2, 2026 (12 days). School resumes Monday, January 5, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Thanksgiving break 2025-2026 for San Diego Unified School District?
calendarFaqs.a: Thanksgiving break for San Diego Unified School District runs November 24–28, 2025 (Monday through Friday). Thanksgiving Day falls on November 27. School resumes Monday, December 1, 2025.

yearNumbers.label: Indigenous Peoples Day
yearNumbers.detail: San Diego Unified observes Indigenous Peoples' Day as a non-instructional day — a district-specific observance that families transferring from other districts often miss the first year.

yearNumbers.label: Lincoln's Birthday
yearNumbers.detail: A holiday on February 13 (Friday before Presidents' Day) observes Lincoln's Birthday — two consecutive no-school days the same weekend, creating an effective 4-day weekend.

yearNumbers.label: Late Spring Recess
yearNumbers.detail: Spring Recess falls at the end of March into April — later than most Bay Area and Central Valley California districts whose breaks fall in mid-March.

calendarNotes: San Diego Unified begins the 2025–2026 school year on August 11, 2025. Spring Recess runs March 30–April 3, 2026. The school year ends May 28, 2026. San Diego's mild marine climate means weather-related cancellations are rare — the published calendar is highly reliable.
